languages.text: "Мне выводить флагман на траекторию высадки, Лорд-капитан?"
"Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"
languages.original_text: "Мне выводить флагман на траекторию высадки, Лорд-капитан?"

traits.locale_text: "Shall I bring the flagship onto the landing vector, Lord Captain?"
"Shall I bring the flagship onto the landing vector, Lord Captain?"
"Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"
"Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"

languages.text: "Soll ich das Flaggschiff in einen orbitalen Vektor bringen, Lord Captain?"
languages.original_text: "Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: "Soll ich das Flaggschiff in einen orbitalen Vektor bringen, Lord Captain?"

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, devrais-je placer le vaisseau amiral sur vecteur orbital ? »
languages.original_text: "Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, devrais-je placer le vaisseau amiral sur vecteur orbital ? »

languages.text: “需要我将旗舰调整到轨道上吗，舰长大人？”
languages.original_text: "Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: “需要我将旗舰调整到轨道上吗，舰长大人？”

languages.text: «¿Llevo la nave insignia a un vector orbital, Lord Capitán?».
languages.original_text: "Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Llevo la nave insignia a un vector orbital, Lord Capitán?».

languages.text: 「ロード・キャプテン、旗艦を周回軌道に乗せましょうか？」
languages.original_text: "Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: 「ロード・キャプテン、旗艦を周回軌道に乗せましょうか？」

languages.text: "Sancak gemisini yörünge vektörüne sokayım mı Lord Kaptan?"
languages.original_text: "Shall I bring the flagship onto an orbit vector, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: "Sancak gemisini yörünge vektörüne sokayım mı Lord Kaptan?"
